model.sql:
WITH g2a_inner_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2a_inner_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    dim_attribute,
    dim_status
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  left_source.business_key,
  left_source.event_ts,
  left_source.metric_value,
  right_source.dim_attribute,
  right_source.dim_status
FROM g2a_inner_join_left_source AS left_source
INNER JOIN g2a_inner_join_right_source AS right_source
  ON left_source.business_key = right_source.business_key

WITH g2b_left_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2b_left_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    dim_attribute,
    dim_status
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  left_source.business_key,
  left_source.event_ts,
  left_source.metric_value,
  right_source.dim_attribute,
  right_source.dim_status
FROM g2b_left_join_left_source AS left_source
LEFT JOIN g2b_left_join_right_source AS right_source
  ON left_source.business_key = right_source.business_key

WITH g2c_right_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2c_right_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    dim_attribute,
    dim_status
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(left_source.business_key, right_source.business_key) AS business_key,
  left_source.event_ts,
  left_source.metric_value,
  right_source.dim_attribute,
  right_source.dim_status
FROM g2c_right_join_left_source AS left_source
RIGHT JOIN g2c_right_join_right_source AS right_source
  ON left_source.business_key = right_source.business_key

WITH g2d_full_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2d_full_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    effective_date,
    dim_attribute
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(left_source.business_key, right_source.business_key) AS business_key,
  left_source.event_ts,
  right_source.effective_date,
  left_source.metric_value,
  right_source.dim_attribute
FROM g2d_full_join_left_source AS left_source
FULL JOIN g2d_full_join_right_source AS right_source
  ON left_source.business_key = right_source.business_key
 AND DATE(left_source.event_ts) = right_source.effective_date

WITH g2e_cross_join_base_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g2e_cross_join_parameter_grid AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM VALUES
    ('baseline', 1.00),
    ('stress', 0.95),
    ('stretch', 1.05)
    AS parameter_grid(scenario_name, scenario_multiplier)
)
SELECT
  base_source.business_key,
  base_source.event_ts,
  parameter_grid.scenario_name,
  base_source.metric_value * parameter_grid.scenario_multiplier AS scenario_metric_value
FROM g2e_cross_join_base_source AS base_source
CROSS JOIN g2e_cross_join_parameter_grid AS parameter_grid

WITH g2f_natural_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    region_code,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2f_natural_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    region_code,
    region_name,
    region_target_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  region_code,
  metric_value,
  region_name,
  region_target_value
FROM g2f_natural_join_left_source
NATURAL INNER JOIN g2f_natural_join_right_source

WITH g2g_using_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    record_date,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2g_using_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    record_date,
    target_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  record_date,
  metric_value,
  target_value,
  metric_value - target_value AS variance_value
FROM g2g_using_left_source
INNER JOIN g2g_using_right_source
  USING (business_key, record_date)

WITH g2h_on_fact_source AS (
  SELECT
    customer_business_key,
    event_date,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2h_on_dimension_source AS (
  SELECT
    lookup_business_key,
    effective_start_date,
    effective_end_date,
    segment_name
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  fact_source.customer_business_key,
  fact_source.event_date,
  fact_source.metric_value,
  dimension_source.segment_name
FROM g2h_on_fact_source AS fact_source
LEFT JOIN g2h_on_dimension_source AS dimension_source
  ON fact_source.customer_business_key = dimension_source.lookup_business_key
 AND fact_source.event_date >= dimension_source.effective_start_date
 AND (
   dimension_source.effective_end_date IS NULL
   OR fact_source.event_date < dimension_source.effective_end_date
 )

WITH g2i_self_join_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    parent_business_key,
    node_name,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  child.business_key,
  child.node_name,
  parent.business_key AS parent_business_key,
  parent.node_name AS parent_node_name,
  child.metric_value
FROM g2i_self_join_source AS child
LEFT JOIN g2i_self_join_source AS parent
  ON child.parent_business_key = parent.business_key

WITH g2j_left_semi_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2j_left_semi_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  left_source.business_key,
  left_source.event_ts,
  left_source.metric_value
FROM g2j_left_semi_join_left_source AS left_source
LEFT SEMI JOIN g2j_left_semi_join_right_source AS right_source
  ON left_source.business_key = right_source.business_key

WITH g2k_left_anti_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2k_left_anti_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  left_source.business_key,
  left_source.event_ts,
  left_source.metric_value
FROM g2k_left_anti_join_left_source AS left_source
LEFT ANTI JOIN g2k_left_anti_join_right_source AS right_source
  ON left_source.business_key = right_source.business_key

WITH g2l_lateral_join_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2l_lateral_join_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    effective_start_ts,
    dim_status,
    dim_priority
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  fact_source.business_key,
  fact_source.event_ts,
  fact_source.metric_value,
  matched_dim.dim_status,
  matched_dim.dim_priority
FROM g2l_lateral_join_left_source AS fact_source
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    dim_status,
    dim_priority
  FROM g2l_lateral_join_right_source AS dim_source
  WHERE dim_source.business_key = fact_source.business_key
    AND dim_source.effective_start_ts <= fact_source.event_ts
  ORDER BY dim_source.effective_start_ts DESC
  LIMIT 1
) AS matched_dim

WITH g2m_correlated_from_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2m_correlated_from_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  base_source.business_key,
  base_source.event_ts,
  base_source.metric_value,
  correlated_stats.matching_row_count,
  correlated_stats.latest_matching_event_ts
FROM g2m_correlated_from_left_source AS base_source,
LATERAL (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS matching_row_count,
    MAX(detail_source.event_ts) AS latest_matching_event_ts
  FROM g2m_correlated_from_right_source AS detail_source
  WHERE detail_source.business_key = base_source.business_key
) AS correlated_stats

WITH g2n_scalar_subquery_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value
FROM g2n_scalar_subquery_source
WHERE metric_value > (
  SELECT AVG(metric_value)
  FROM g2n_scalar_subquery_source
)

WITH g2o_correlated_subquery_outer_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2o_correlated_subquery_inner_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  outer_source.business_key,
  outer_source.event_ts,
  outer_source.metric_value,
  (
    SELECT AVG(inner_source.metric_value)
    FROM g2o_correlated_subquery_inner_source AS inner_source
    WHERE inner_source.business_key = outer_source.business_key
  ) AS avg_metric_value_for_business_key
FROM g2o_correlated_subquery_outer_source AS outer_source

WITH g2p_exists_fact_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2p_exists_lookup_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    active_flag
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  fact_source.business_key,
  fact_source.event_ts,
  fact_source.metric_value
FROM g2p_exists_fact_source AS fact_source
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM g2p_exists_lookup_source AS lookup_source
  WHERE lookup_source.business_key = fact_source.business_key
    AND lookup_source.active_flag = 'Y'
)

WITH g2q_in_fact_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g2q_in_lookup_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    active_flag
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  fact_source.business_key,
  fact_source.event_ts,
  fact_source.metric_value
FROM g2q_in_fact_source AS fact_source
WHERE fact_source.business_key IN (
  SELECT lookup_source.business_key
  FROM g2q_in_lookup_source AS lookup_source
  WHERE lookup_source.active_flag = 'Y'
    AND lookup_source.business_key IS NOT NULL
)
